title: Petface Farmyard Buddies Crinkle Flat Pig Plush Dog Toy with Built-In Squeaker (Pack of 1)
features: COSY & DURABLE: Give your furry friend endless fun with this high-quality, super cosy plush dog toy
FEATURES: Soft, cuddly plush with a built-in squeaker for interactive entertainment
BENEFITS: Provides comfort and satisfaction to keep your pet entertained indoors or outdoors
PLAYFUL FUN: The crinkle flat pig design adds a twist to playtime, making it an engaging and enjoyable experience for your pup

TOY SAFETY: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘chew’ damage, please supervise your pet with this toy, examine regularly for wear, and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer About Petface Petface - your pets best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding accessories, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Petface Farmyard Buddies Crinkle Flat Pig Plush Dog Toy Petface Buddies Crinkle Flat Pig Plush Dog Toy is a cuddly snuggly companion for your pooch. The soft flat body contains a material that makes a crinkle sound when played with, encouraging sensory exploration and development. The built in squeaker adds an extra element of fun and provides your doggo with hours of interactive enrichment. About Petface All your needs are covered with the Petface range, including collars, leads, toys, feeding, coats and bedding. The designers at Petface have ensured the range has a co-ordinated look and style making sure your pets will be the ‘best dressed in town’. Keep your dog entertained! This dog toy is perfect for stimulating your dog with crinkle and squeaker. A cuddly toy for your dog made in the style of a playful pig, offering hours of play time and snuggles! Contains material inside that will make a crinkle noise when played. Dogs are playful by nature - a toy guaranteed to keep dogs amused. A best friend for your pooch! Introducing Petface Flat Pig Crinkle Dog Toy – the ultimate playtime partner for your pooch! This delightful toy offers comfort, companionship and fun to your furry friend.
